watchlistScreen.title: My Watchlist

insightsScreen.errorHint: {{error}} Close this notice and generate again.
insightsScreen.generating: Generating a new insight, keeping current cards visible...

compareScreen.desc: Track relative performance of two assets in the same period on one chart.
